---
name: Plugin Submission
about: Submit a new plugin to the marketplace
title: '[Plugin] '
labels: 'plugin-submission'
assignees: ''
---

## Plugin Information

**Plugin Name:**
**Plugin Type:** [ ] Slash Command  [ ] Hook  [ ] Output Style  [ ] MCP Server  [ ] Skill
**Author:**
**Repository/Source:**

## Description

Provide a clear description of what your plugin does and why it's useful.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Plugin includes `plugin.json` manifest
- [ ] Plugin includes detailed `README.md`
- [ ] Plugin has been tested locally
- [ ] Plugin follows naming conventions (kebab-case)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included
- [ ] License specified (Apache-2.0 recommended)
- [ ] README includes usage examples

## Additional Information

Any special requirements, dependencies, or notes about your plugin.
